EASTBOUND I-2/US 83 NEAR MERCEDES - WATER COMPLETELY COVERING THE RIGHT TWO LANES AND SHOULDER. POLICE HAVE CLOSED THOSE LANES AS A RESULT.
NWS EMPLOYEE REPORTED WATER UP TO THE TOPS OF WHEELS, SO TWO FEET DEEP, AND SEVERAL STALLED VEHICLES ALONG WB FRONTAGE ROAD NEAR RGV PREMIUM OUTLETS.
A CO-OP OBSERVER REPORTED 5.8 INCHES BETWEEN 10:30 AM AND 2 PM ALONG WITH MINOR FLOODING IN THE PORT MANSFIELD AREA. ALSO REPORTED ONE HOUSE FLOODED.
MERCEDES EM REPORTED ONGOING WATER RESCUES FROM VEHICLES ALONG THE I-2 FRONTAGE ROAD AND HIGHWAY 491.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO SHOWS WATER COMING UP TO HOMES IN THE MERCEDES AREA.
LOS FRESNOS POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS MORE THAN 10 STREETS IN THE CITY OF LOS FRESNOS EXPERIENCING FLOODING AT THIS TIME. FLOODWATER RISING OVER THE CURBS AND SPILLING ONTO SIDEWALKS.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO SHOWS MORRISON ROAD NEAR HOME DEPOT COVERED WITH SEVERAL INCHES OF WATER.
PICTURE FROM THE PUBLIC SHOWS EAST DRIVE COMPLETELY COVERED WITH WATER.
BROWNSVILLE POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS ABOUT 30 STREETS IN THE CITY OF BROWNSVILLE EXPERIENCING FLOODING AT THIS TIME. FLOODWATERS ARE DEEP ENOUGH THAT CARS CANNOT DRIVE THROUGH.

PUBLIC REPORTS FRONTAGE ROAD NEAR SUNRISE MALL IN BROWNSVILLE EXTREMELY FLOODED, WITH FLOODWATERS UP TO THE HEADLIGHTS OF CARS. ADDITIONAL FLOODING OF UNKNOWN DEPTH ON FM 802. REPORT OBTAINED THROUGH TELEVISION STATION SOCIAL MEDIA PAGE.
CAMERON COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT REPORTED FM 2480 BETWEEN BAYVIEW AND LOS FRESNOS FLOODED. FLOODWATERS OF 1 FOOT COVERING WESTBOUND LANE.
VIDEO ON SOCIAL MEDIA SHOWS FLOODING ON LARGE SWATH OF BOCA CHICA BOULEVARD IN BROWNSVILLE. FLOODWATERS UP TO THE TOP OF CAR WHEELS. VIDEO POSTED ON TELEVISION STATION SOCIAL MEDIA PAGE.
PUBLIC PICTURE SHOWS SIGNIFICANT FLOODING ON MEXICO BOULEVARD UNDER THE RAILROAD TRACK.
PUBLIC REPORTS THE RESACAS NEAR VALLEY INTERNATIONAL COUNTRY CLUB (VICC) BETWEEN COUNTRY CLUB ROAD AND LAREDO ROAD HAS OVERFLOWED ONTO PARTS OF FM 802.
UTRGV CAMPUS OFFICIALS REPORT SEVERAL STREETS NEAR THE BROWNSVILLE CAMPUS ARE FLOODED AND PORTIONS OF THE CAMPUS ARE WITHOUT POWER. REPORT RELAYED THROUGH SOCIAL MEDIA.
PUBLIC REPORTS PART OF THE RIGHT LANES ALONG FM 511 HAVE STANDING WATER.
PUBLIC REPORTED APPROXIMATELY 18 INCHES OF WATER ABOVE THE WATER GUTTER LEVEL ON E MADISON STREET NEAR WASHINGTON PARK.
PUBLIC REPORTS SEVERAL PARTS OF FRONTAGE ROAD ARE FLOODED BETWEEN BOCA CHICA BOULEVARD, EAST PRICE ROAD, AND FM 802.
PUBLIC REPORTS NUMEROUS PARTS OF SEVILLE BOULEVARD, DUCK POND DRIVE, AND SEVERAL STREETS OFF DUCK POND DRIVE HAVE WATER COVERING THEM.
PUBLIC REPORTS NORTH FRONTAGE ROAD NEAR LORENALY DRIVE IS FLOODED WITH UNKNOWN DEPTH.
PUBLIC POSTED PICTURES OF SIGNIFICANT STREET FLOODING, SOME WATER ALMOST UP TO THE BOTTOM OF MAIL BOXES, IN THE BROWNSVILLE COUNTRY CLUB AREA.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO FROM PUBLIC SHOWING FLOOD WATER OF APPROXIMATELY 6 INCHES ON LAS PALMAS CIRCLE.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO FROM THE PUBLIC SHOWS WATER HALFWAY UP WHEELS ON VEHICLES AND A COUPLE OF STALLED CARS IN THE OLMITO ESTATES NEIGHBORHOOD.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO POSTED BY PUBLIC SHOWS SEVERAL INCHES OF WATER COMPLETELY COVERING DIEGO LANE.
PICTURE FROM SOCIAL MEDIA SHOWING MARINA DRIVE COVERED WITH SEVERAL INCHES OF WATER.

PICTURES FROM THE PUBLIC SHOWS SIGNIFICANT FLOODING AT OLD ALICE ROAD AND PRICE ROAD WITH WATER NEARING GAS PUMPS AND BUILDINGS. ANOTHER IMAGE SHOWS SEVERAL INCHES OF WATER ALONG PRICE ROAD AND CORIA STREET.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO SHOWS SEVERAL SEGMENTS OF PADRE BOULEVARD COVERED WITH WATER ALONG WITH NUMEROUS SIDE STREETS.
PICTURE FROM THE PUBLIC SHOWS SEVERAL WATER COVERED STREETS IN THE LA LOMITA SUBDIVISION.
PICTURE FROM PUBLIC SHOWS THE RESACA OVERFLOWING ONTO SHIDLER DRIVE WITH SEVERAL INCHES OF WATER.
PUBLIC PICTURE SHOWS WATER COVERED INTERSECTIONS IN THE TRADITION ESTATES AREA WITH WATER COMING UP TO THE BUMPER OF A SEDAN.
SEVERAL PICTURES OF SIGNIFICANT STREET FLOODING IN THE WINDWOOD SUBDIVISION AREA.
SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO FROM THE PUBLIC SHOWS SEVERAL WATER COVERED STREETS AND INTERSECTIONS IN THE ARROYO COLORADO ESTATES AREA. APPROXIMATE WATER DEPTH IS 12 TO 18 INCHES.
ALSO REPORTED PEA TO DIME SIZE HAIL.
